title: Payment QR Display
purpose: Teach the agent how to present the returned payment QR without corrupting or replacing it.
when_to_use: Checkout returns human_action.kind=auth_qr for first-purchase provider authorization.
The CLI returned human_action.kind=payment_qr, qr_png_url, preferred_qr_url, or qr_image_url.
The human needs to scan with Alipay sandbox.

commands.intent: create payment intent through the high-level buy flow
recover a scanner order-not-found display problem
commands.command: itp buyer payment refresh-qr <payment_intent_id> --reason order-not-found --display agent --json
commands.success_signal: response.payment_intent.human_action.local_qr_path or response.payment_intent.qr_png_url is present and status is still waiting_user_payment or verified

agent_rules: If human_action.kind is auth_qr, present the ItPay auth entry URL/QR and explain it is account login/registration consent before payment.
For auth_qr, the ItPay auth entry is the primary handoff. oauth_start_url is fallback/debug and should not replace the ItPay orchestration page.
For auth_qr, do not call payment-intent creation directly; poll checkout or run buyer checkout resume until payment_intent_id appears.
Show local_qr_path first when present. If not present, show qr_png_url or preferred_qr_url as the primary scannable QR.
Use qr_image_url/SVG only as a fallback when PNG/local rendering is unavailable.
For mobile users, present mobile_wallet_url as a clickable payment button when present.
payment_entry_url is a browser/status fallback, not the main QR payload.
Opening the payment page must not be treated as paid.
After showing QR, immediately wait for payment verification.
forbidden: Do not encode payment_entry_url into a new QR.
Do not encode mobile_wallet_url into a new QR.
Do not bypass the ItPay auth orchestration page by making oauth_start_url the primary user-facing link.
Do not rewrite, shorten, summarize, or translate QR URLs.
Do not expose raw provider QR payload in chat.
Do not treat QR display as payment success.

next_docs.condition: QR is visible to the human
